title: Deep Breathing
description: Take slow, comfortable breaths and let each exhale soften your shoulders.

title: Box Breathing
description: Inhale, pause, exhale, and pause again for an easy count of four.

title: Neck Stretch
description: Let one ear move gently toward one shoulder, then switch sides.

title: Shoulder Rolls
description: Roll your shoulders slowly backward, then forward, with loose arms.

title: Wrist Stretch
description: Extend one arm and gently draw the fingers back, then switch hands.

title: Seated Twist
description: Sit tall, turn gently to each side, and keep your breathing easy.

title: Standing Reach
description: Stand tall and reach both arms overhead before lowering them slowly.

title: Gentle Side Bend
description: Reach one arm overhead and lean gently to each side.

title: Ankle Circles
description: Lift one foot slightly and circle the ankle slowly in both directions.

title: Eye Break
description: Look away from the screen and rest your focus on something farther away.

title: Walking
description: Walk at a comfortable pace and leave your screen behind.

title: Air Squats
description: Complete controlled bodyweight squats at a steady pace.

title: Lunges
description: Alternate comfortable forward lunges with a steady, upright posture.

title: Wall Pushups
description: Place your hands on a wall and complete slow, controlled pushups.

title: Hip Mobility
description: Move through slow hip circles, changing direction halfway through.

title: Hamstring Stretch
description: Extend one leg, hinge forward gently, then switch sides.

title: Calf Raises
description: Rise onto your toes, pause briefly, and lower with control.

title: March in Place
description: March steadily in place and let your arms swing naturally.

title: Torso Rotation
description: Stand tall and rotate gently from side to side with relaxed arms.

title: Standing Balance
description: Balance on one foot, reset, and repeat on the other side.

title: Low-Impact Jacks
description: Step one foot out while raising both arms, return to center, then switch sides.

title: Incline Mountain Climbers
description: Place both hands on a stable desk, keep your body long, and alternate drawing each knee forward.

title: Standing Burpees
description: Reach overhead, squat toward chair height, step each foot back, then step in and stand tall.

title: Standing Knee Drives
description: Drive one knee toward the opposite hand, return to standing, and alternate sides.

title: Plank
description: Brace your hands on a stable desk or wall, keep a straight line from shoulders to heels, and hold.

title: Split Squats
description: Use a staggered stance for controlled repetitions on each side.

title: Brisk March Intervals
description: March briskly for 30 seconds, then march gently for 30 seconds, and alternate those intervals.

title: Desk Pushups
description: Place your hands on a stable desk, keep your body straight, lower your chest, and press away.

title: Bodyweight Circuit
description: Complete each movement in order with steady, controlled form.
sequenceSteps: 8 pushups at a wall or stable desk
20-second incline plank at a wall or stable desk

title: Dynamic Mobility Flow
description: Complete each mobility movement in order with a comfortable range of motion.
